   → /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-flagged-partnerships.jsonl

   → /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-dms.jsonl

3. ✅ Set up DM ingestion (choose one):
   a) Email Forwarding → youtube-dm-email-parser.py
   b) Webhook Receiver → youtube-dm-webhook.py
   c) Manual Queue → .cache/youtube-dm-inbox.jsonl

4. ✅ Schedule hourly cron job:
   0 * * * * cd /Users/abundance/.openclaw/workspace && python3 .cache/youtube_dm_monitor.py >> .cache/youtube-dms-cron.log 2>&1
